2026/05/20 17:04:54.800166020 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800173714 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800229348 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800230761 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800249656 {
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800250257 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800259715 new <- list()
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800260266 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800268461 new$width <- width
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800268882 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800277368 new$height <- height
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800277829 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800286314 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800286745 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800295181 new$title <- title
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800295592 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800303817 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800304238 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800329074 new$version <- version
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800356697 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800365644 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800399646 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800401921 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800424132 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800425144 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800438008 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800438789 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800451353 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800451914 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800471170 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800472332 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800493523 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800504472 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800505304 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800520703 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800521193 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800531092 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800531583 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800540760 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800541161 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800550187 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800550688 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800561709 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800562160 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800572680 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800573150 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800583089 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800583510 "default"))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800600973 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800601874 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800616052 }
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800624086 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800624927 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800641649 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800642410 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800655374 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800655845 }
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800664391 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800664802 }
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800672927 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800673348 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800682685 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800683236 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800693115 domain = NA)
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800701080 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800710347 }
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800710788 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800719414 old$family <- family
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800719855 }
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800735173 version <- old$version
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800736025 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800752666 "2.0")
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800753638 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800767624 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800768566 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800784986 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800785948 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800797660 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800798211 domain = NA)
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800807689 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800808110 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800819641 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800820162 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800832054 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800834098 invisible()
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800842935 }

2026/05/20 17:04:54.800401921 new$encoding <- encoding

2026/05/20 17:04:54.800451914 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800471170 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/05/20 17:04:54.800541161 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800550187 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800550688 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800561709 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800562160 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/20 17:04:54.800583510 "default"))
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800600973 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800601874 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800616052 }
2026/05/20 17:04:54.800624086 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
